creator: dbuckhal@yahoo.com
text:
I had a typo in the Synopsis.  It should be "nfe" not "nve"
   
  >Synopsis: nve interface locks up during rc.conf initialization

  To be clear, this is regarding the FreeBSD based nfe driver.
   
  Thanks,
   
  Derrick
